programme.title: Blue World Ep604: Exploring Devil's Hole Cave in Nevada, USA
programme.desc: One of the largest aquifers in the United States is located directly beneath Death Valley. Blue World is invited to join a team of scientists working at Devil’s Hole Cave in Nevada and is afforded a once-in-a-lifetime permit from the National Park Service to dive in Devil’s Hole Cave. Fewer than 20 people have ever been allowed to dive in this otherworldly cave system.

programme.title: The Bassquatch Hunter: Country Music vs. Kayak Fishing
programme.desc: What goes together better than country music, bonfires and fishing? Mike links up with fellow Michigan native Sadie Bass! Sadie was a contestant on The Voice in 2022 and is no stranger to the outdoors. But how does she do with her first time fishing in a kayak? How does Mike do playing guitar with her and one of her hit songs? Check out all the fun and great adventures in this episode!

programme.title: Lost In Indonesia
programme.desc: We journey to a long forgotten zone deep in the northern Sumatran area with world-class professional surfers Mikala Jones, Marti Paradisis and Bryce Young. They search this region of Indonesia for incredible waves and have fabulous adventures along the way. The final session is testament to their willingness to go the extra mile to score the perfect wave.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep406: Central Oregon Coast
programme.desc: Segments include Sand Dune Exploring via Dune Buggy; The Oregon Coast Aquarium; Crabbing via boat in Newport; plus innovative ways to cook Crab.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep109
programme.desc: Liquid Edge highlights surfing in Mexico in the documentary Gone; surf action with Mexican pro Fernando Stalla; a Storm Surfer profile on Mark Mathews; a look at surf life in Sayulita, Mexico, with Diego Cadena; Adan Hernandez goes off; whitewater kayaking adventures in Croatia; a session with Storm Surfing’s big-wave rider Paul Morgan; renowned French photo-journalist Paul Villecourt trains his cameras on a paddleboard expedition; plus a profile on the birthplace for modern kiteboarding, Leucate, France.

programme.title: Mapping The Blue: World's largest Marine Park
programme.desc: The Cook Islands recently announced the designation of the largest Marine Park on Earth. In stunning 4K imagery, this documentary tells the story of how Kevin Iro, founder of the park, along with his team, use a high tech GIS system to designate multi-use areas inside the pristine park.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep108: Hammerhead Sharks + Blue Hole Adventure in Belize
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV explores the odd behavior of Hammerhead Sharks; goes on a Blue Hole adventure in Belize featuring a friendly shark; and takes a Deeper Dive to study Scalloped Hammerhead Sharks and Nurse Sharks.

programme.title: Blue World Ep604: Exploring Devil's Hole Cave in Nevada, USA
programme.desc: One of the largest aquifers in the United States is located directly beneath Death Valley. Blue World is invited to join a team of scientists working at Devil’s Hole Cave in Nevada and is afforded a once-in-a-lifetime permit from the National Park Service to dive in Devil’s Hole Cave. Fewer than 20 people have ever been allowed to dive in this otherworldly cave system.

programme.desc: We journey to a long forgotten zone deep in the northern Sumatran area with world-class professional surfers Mikala Jones, Marti Paradisis and Bryce Young. They search this region of Indonesia for incredible waves and have fabulous adventures along the way. programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Eversince
programme.desc: Can you remember the moment you knew you were hooked on snowboarding? 'Eversince' is a film about the first time, and chasing the unforgettable feeling every time after. Featuring: Lucas Debari, Jason Robinson, Keegan Valaika, Lizard King, Manuel Diaz, Bode Merrill, Nicolas Müller, Fredi Kalbermatten, Cale Zima, Brandon Cocard.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 1
programme.desc: Your friends at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 2
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 3
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Mountain Minded - Episode 4
programme.desc: The fine folks at Absinthe Films, along with Nils Mindnich, Pat Moore, Kimmy Fasani, Jeff Pensiero and others, remind you to prepare for the season with safe practices in mind.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: AfterForever
programme.desc: When resistance fades, growth begins. AfterForever is a meditation on change, exploring evolution in snowboarding and life, and asking what happens when one chapter ends and another begins.

programme.title: Wash'Dup
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this mockumentary film will follow a group of ex- snowboard filmmakers and ex-pro riders who never hung it up. Still in love with the sport and fueled by mid life crisis, these shred for lifers are extremely vulnerable to delusions of grandeur. But the dream is always “still alive” in their minds. In turn they ignore all the red flags and continue to do what seems completely irrational to everyone except for them. After a 16 year hiatus, they irresponsibly put their adult obligations behind, and join a pact to make just one last movie. But they are missing a solid presence of youth to make their movie marketable. As a remedy they end up filming with riders that span 2 generations. This unlikely alliance leads them to discover much more about snowboarding and themselves by living the snowboarding dream through an ageless lens. Filled with sketch comedy skits, this film expresses the nuanced story of a young sport reaching a level of maturity the current industry now begins to embrace. From the death of the snowboard shop, and extinction of film media, to the old pro struggling to find their way in life after the glory days are long gone, WashDup is a story that finally needs to be told.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 01
programme.desc: Elena Hight is one of the most accomplished women in snowboarding history. Interestingly, her passion for boardsports culture originated in her home state of Hawaii on the island of Kauai. This is where Elena’s Microdose series begins. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Papa Mike, Chris Owen, Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 02
programme.desc: From the moment she strapped into a snowboard, Elena Hight has been an innovative and visionary force in women’s snowboarding. In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we take a look at two of Elena’s greatest achievements. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Scotty Lago and Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 03
programme.desc: At age 16, during the 2006 Torino Olympics, Elena Hight was the youngest American to compete in Women’s Halfpipe. In 2010, at the Vancouver Olympics, she sowed the seeds of change to come. In Episode 3 of Elena’s Microdose series we explore more. Featuring Selema Masekela, Papa Mike and Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 04
programme.desc: Failure in life can be our biggest teacher. In Episode 4 of her Microdose series, we learn how Elena Hight embraced failure on the global stage, embarked on transformative change, and unlocked her next level. Featuring Selema Masekela, Hana Beaman, Spencer O'Brien, Jamie Anderson, and Jeremy Jones.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 05
programme.desc: When Elena Hight made the surprising decision to set aside her Olympic routine to pursue backcountry riding, she astonished her peers and mentors. In Episode 5 of her Microdose series, we learn how and why Elena made the leap. Featuring Jeremy Jones, Hana Beaman, Todd Jones, and Jamie Anderson.

programme.title: Arc’teryx Presents: On The Verge
programme.desc: In the mountains behind the coastal town of Powell River, BC, rock climbers have spent decades quietly pioneering routes on some of the largest granite walls in Canada. As the landscape comes under threat of logging, the climbing community faces an uncertain future. Lives! Logs! Legacies!

programme.title: Titans of Business
programme.desc: There have been many stories and documentaries on the Bill Gates’, Steve Jobs’ and Henry Fords’ of the world. What about the thousands of other business people, that had a better idea or way to make life better, cheaper, and faster? People who started out from meager beginnings or limited education, to become very wealthy! Many of these people are among us and act no differently than we do, but they have a success story to tell and tricks of success to share. These are the people profiled in “Titans of Business”.

programme.title: Homegrown Hunter TV
programme.desc: This is incredible to say the least--to hold his composure, focus on two specific bucks, and pass so many deer when he has a buck tag in his pocket. Mr. Kohnke has some patience! But that is what management of the deer herd is all about.

programme.title: Documentary - Abandoned Dreams
programme.desc: The abandoned boat dilemma is one of the most frustrating and alarming issues facing British Columbia's coastal communities. Reaching the end of their life cycle, with limited disposal options and almost no way to track ownership, hundreds of old boats are being left to rot, and sink or drift onto beaches and shorelines around our province. The result is a province-wide problem that affects coastal navigation, tourism and the environment. Abandoned Dreams looks into the root causes of this derelict boat epidemic and the future plans for safe boat disposal and recycling in BC.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Horsewomen
programme.desc: This week Ride celebrates three extraordinary horsewomen and the captivating connection they have with their equine friends. We showcase exhebition work from American dressage star Sabine Schut-Kery, experience life through a lens with Poland’s fine art horse photographer Katarzyna Okrzesik-Mikolajek, and witness the holistic approach to healing in South West England with renowned trainer Connie Cox.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 5: Heroes Healers
programme.desc: This week Ride exercises military precision with the mounts of the Household Cavalry at the British Army’s London Barracks, and sees second chances given to troubled residents at Achterhoek horse shelter in the Netherlands. We’re in the back seat with Polish driving expert Piotr Mazurek and catch up with this year’s Longines FEI Rising Star Award winner, Germany’s Greta Busacker.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Wildlife
programme.desc: Discover the untamed beauty of Oman in this captivating video, showcasing majestic wildlife, serene landscapes, and the harmonious sounds of nature, from camels crossing peaks to flamingos painting the sunset sky.

programme.title: time2Rlx - Night Sky
programme.desc: This relaxing film, designed to help with sleep, features breathtaking footage from Arctic Norway. Enjoy the stunning Northern Lights and calming music, creating a peaceful atmosphere for rest and relaxation.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: What are the characteristics of a typical German car? Do stereotypes like functionality, reliability but also a certain dullness paint a realistic picture? Also, we explored if the Volkswagen Golf GTE could bring new impulses to the brand's model range.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Nürburgring Nordschleife is known as the toughest speedway in the world. Together with race driver Hans-Joachim Stuck we take a look at the history of this iconic race track as well as the events and record attempts that have been taking place there.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV
programme.desc: On Put Your Car On TV, car fans from the Middle East can have their darlings rated in terms of speed, style and sound. Included this time: a Nova SS, a special Honda Accord and a car clad in crystals.

programme.title: Put Your Car On TV

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Station Wagons like the Volvo V60 Polestar aren't just family vans anymore but basically very roomy sports cars. Mercedes followed a more luxurious approach with their E43 AMG T model. And: the ultimate powerhouse station wagon, the Audi RS6.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Even though the Mercedes-AMG A45 Performmaster has just four cylinders, its sound is similar to its V8-colleagues by AMG. Also: the car tuning company MTM offers a similarly powerful alternative, based on an Audi: the RS3 R.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Porsche's 911 Turbo S Cabriolet is a timelessly elegant all-rounder and nevertheless more of a cruiser than a sports vehicle. In direct contrast, the Rolls Royce Dawn provides luxury and elegance at a new level.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With their new DB 11, Aston Martin heads towards the future at full throttle. Also: after its facelift the Nissan GTR presented itself freshly streamlined and more powerful than ever. And: Lamborghini's V10 fighting bull, the Huracán.

programme.title: Made in...

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Preview
programme.desc: Since it was first set up back in 2014, the GC32 Racing Tour has become one of the most sought after for those who enjoy sailing at its finest and fastest. The 2021’s season again proved why the world’s top professional and amateurs love this tour!After a challenging 2020, when the Tour was cancelled, it finally returned better than ever and made 2021 a year to remember. Through the season, the four stops offered nail-biting action in breath taking venues that brought the best out of these dynamic and fast one design foiling catamarans.The level of expectation and the anticipation was extremely high when the owner-driver and commercially-backed professional teams were about to hit again the water and both the organizers and the participants proved that it was worth waiting for the comeback. So let’s remember the most notable moments of what was a fascinating season full of top-level sailing battles in some crystal clear blue waters.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - Episode 1 - Portrait of Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Welcome to the 20th edition of Les Voiles de St. Tropez. The legendary bay of Brigitte Bardot is home one more time to one of the most glamorous regattas in the world. Here, more than 200 Classic and modern yachts sail side by side in the golden Saint Tropez to win this delightful competition.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 2 - Brac – Hvar
programme.desc: In this episode we are taking you to a surfer's paradise – the island of Brač! We are on a journey to find out why Brač is called by many the island of a million olives, and we are going to explore the beautiful Pakleni islands that are close to this location. Get to know the fantastic wines of the island of Hvar and treat ourselves to some drunk lobster.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 3 - Split – Trogir
programme.desc: It is time to explore the wonders of Split, city of the monumental Diocletian's Palace. In this occasion, we will introduce you to the region's beautiful marinas, show you the fastest way of traveling within Croatia and explore the spots you should not miss out.

programme.title: City of Vultures 3
programme.desc: Richard joins in the drug trade, as advocates for reform urge him to change. G attempts to raise his son on Chicago's violent south side.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Armenian Haunting
programme.desc: An Armenian-American journalist turns into an unwilling ghost hunter while researching the sudden deaths in her family and their connection to a paranormal mystery.

programme.title: Sadomaster
programme.desc: Extreme urban violence reigns in Argentina. Senator Beccar Varela rises as the only way to stop violence with his "zero tolerance" politic. People doesn't suspect that Beccar is the head of the nazi gang that causes the violence. When members of the gang torture and rape a retarded man, a mysterious Masked avenger begins his brutal revenge against the gangs and the corrupt politics.

programme.title: Domestic Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Julia are a couple with dark secrets. Blanca is a tortured soul with a past. And Olivia is hellbent on finding the truth. When these four lives intersect, nobody escapes. Bonds are tested; wills are broken; and, metal is forged. It's a tale of survival, trust, and darkness from the creators of Bloody Drama.

programme.title: The Edison Death Machine
programme.desc: Thought only to exist in legend, Edison's device for contacting the dead is found...and stolen. A group of professional thieves go on a global crime spree reanimating the dead in order to steal treasures thought long lost. Things begin to go wrong when they cannot control the creatures, and the machine begins to develop a mind of its own.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E22 - Harry The Mysterious Prince
programme.desc: Despite all the media buzz, much of it not exactly flattering, Harry remains a bit of an enigma. This engaging documentary offers fresh insights and footage to shed light on a royal prince who has dealt with both heartache and scandals.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's Uncharted - S01:E13 - The Best of Season 1
programme.desc: The best adventures and highlights from Uncharted so far.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E05 - Counting Shells
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers spend a lot of time enforcing the laws of waterfowl hunting; using canoes they work silently across the state's largest game area; it's not all work as one officer oversees a class trip to the pheasant field.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E06 - Shed Hunting
programme.desc: Looking for antlers on opening day is like Christmas for shed hunters; a few are willing to break the law for a crack at a monster shed; Montana wardens are on the look out for one offender who is no stranger to a run-in with the law.

programme.title: The New Frontier - S01:E04 - Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: It has fired our imaginations for millennia, Mars, the God of War and the source of Man's science fictional demise. We know the dry barren planet was once flowing with vast reservoirs of water, the sky thick and filled with clouds and the tantalizing possibility of life. It is the only other place in our solar system than Man might

programme.title: The New Frontier - S01:E05 - The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our Solar System four and half billion years ago there remains tantalizing clues to its evolution; remnent debris: asteroids and comets. They vary in size from grains of dust to mountain sides, footballs to planetoids. They were the building Now within our grasp these rocks of ice and dust are ready to give up their secrets.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E09 - Rennes and Provo
programme.desc: This gastronomic tour of Brittany stops off for crêpes in Rennes and Oysters in Cancale before visiting the historic walled city of St Malo. Then on to the island of Providenciales, known locally as Provo, in the Turks and Caicos Caribbean islands with buggy racing on the beach and a spot of shopping for some very expensive wines.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E10 - Stockholm and Lisbon
programme.desc: For a weekend winter break, Stockholm has got to be one of most beautiful cities to visit. Made up of 14 separate islands, it’s one of the best-preserved and largest mediaeval cities in Europe. Then some summer sun in the Portuguese capitol, Lisbon, for a whistle stop cultural tour of the city and a surfing lesson along the coast.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E30 - Prince William And Prince Harry Prisoners Of Celebrity
programme.desc: Two young men who have had to cope with extraordinarily challenging events and circumstances as, together, they have gone on to change the face of the British royal family and carve meaningful roles for themselves in the modern world. Made in 1999 two years after the death of their mother, Princess Diana, this original and touching documentary examines the lives of the royal princes, the legacy of their mother, the responsibilities of being a royal - and what the future holds for them.

programme.title: Family Fever
programme.desc: A German Mumblecore tragicomedy set in a Brandenburg mansion. Three couples, six people, love, deceit, and the question: what's next?

programme.title: Away You Go
programme.desc: Compassionate mumblecore-style drama about a young woman's struggles with the expectations placed on her by her partner and friends.

programme.title: Kleptomami
programme.desc: A film about the absurdities of being a mom today.

programme.title: Minus One
programme.desc: Summer in Athens, and Elsa’s family isn’t the only one renting their apartment to tourists. At their "spare apartment" there’s little space for the young lady’s dreams.

programme.title: In Heaven's Meadow
programme.desc: After an assault, Maya tries to find her way back into life.

programme.title: Happiness Is a Warm Gun
programme.desc: Green Party icon Petra Kelly is shot in her sleep by her partner Gert Bastian, an ex-Federal Armed Forces general, before he kills himself.

programme.title: Of Neo-Nazis and Superheroes – How the Far Right is Changing a Small German Town
programme.desc: In the summer of 2017, 6,000 neo-Nazis from all over Europe gathered in Themar for the largest right-wing rock concert of the German post war era.

programme.title: We will survive
programme.desc: At the Julie-Roger-Haus in Frankfurt am Main, a care facility for seniors of all sexual orientations, "grandpa is finally allowed to be gay" (FAZ).

programme.title: Le Ciel, la Terre et L'Homme
programme.desc: The Aït Seghrouchen, a nomadic people from the windswept Moroccan desert, brave sandstorms, watch livestock and the cell phone towers.

programme.title: Blue Summer Symphony
programme.desc: The air smells like summer. A potpourri of suntan lotion lawn and lime blossom fries, of water polo melon and chlorine lemonade hovering in the air.

programme.title: Fall Pinguin
programme.desc: The penguins encounter Swiss alpine cows, swim in the river, walk leisurely through the city center... they are everywhere. An adventure begins.

programme.title: Cabin of Errors
programme.desc: When Peter and Nancy split up, their friends plot to bring them back together during a trip to a cabin. But things go hilariously wrong when Peter comes to the cabin with other intentions. A modern day romantic comedy farce.

programme.title: Frank Fearless
programme.desc: An aging reprobate, a rural boy, a large dog and an orphaned baby rhino set out to stop the rhino slaughter. Their quest buffets them between high comedy and searing tragedy, until they end up an inspiration and a conscience to a world in need of heroes.

programme.title: The Malibu Beach Vampires
programme.desc: In addition to the traditional bloodsuckers, there are other kinds of vampires, you know...such as some politicians, military people, and evangelists.

programme.title: Holy Driver
programme.desc: Father Mike has a sit down with Donny, a Mob Capo and Carl, an undercover cop. He tells them that he and some other priests want to clean house and that they need their help to dispose of a pedophile priest. Things really hit home hard.

programme.title: Nightmoor Manor
programme.desc: Elspeth, a plucky orphan girl turned governess, takes a post at Nightmoor Manor, and meets her brooding new employer.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water?

programme.title: We Are Golden
programme.desc: The 2023 Gaels look to take back control of this decades-long battle. Legendary Coach Frank Tindall is one of the greatest of all time.

programme.title: We Are Golden

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett

programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E12 - Episode 12
programme.desc: Dineo makes a drastic turn in her feud with the Price sisters, shocking even her own lawyer. Petra’s new journey coincides with the arrival of a new senior team member.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E13 - Episode 13
programme.desc: The Price family divide widens as the court case approaches. Petra finds herself compromised as a colleague tests the line.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E14 - Episode 14
programme.desc: As Dineo is shredded in court, it seems more and more certain that Felicity will get all that she desires. Mike’s advances make Petra increasingly uncomfortable.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E15 - Episode 15
programme.desc: With Sims’ help, Petra attempts to smoke out Mike. Dineo convinces herself that what happened with the familiar stranger meant nothing.

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E16 - Episode 16

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E08 - Episode 08
programme.desc: The Potgieters reel in the wake of the tragedy, and as blame and acrimony begin to swirl, Petra comes to a realisation. Gordon puts his pride on the line to broker the peace between his family.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E09 - Episode 09
programme.desc: Kedibone’s sixth sense causes Dineo to doubt that the new girl in SJ’s life is telling the truth. Despite an intervention by Stefan, Willem’s guilt and despair drive him deeper into a dark place.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E10 - Episode 10
programme.desc: Dineo has no choice but to read SJ the riot act, while things fall apart at the Potgieter house.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm

programme.title: Kansas City Confidential

programme.title: Winded
programme.desc: If you’ve been feeling worn down or tired, this one’s for you. In “Winded,” Pastor Steven Furtick shows us that when the wind is against us and our energy is waning, God’s hand is still over us.

programme.title: The Restriction Has Been Lifted
programme.desc: In “The Restriction Has Been Lifted,” Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us that despite what our current situations look like God still has the ability to do exceedingly, abundantly, and above all that we ask or think.

programme.title: Faithful With A Few
programme.desc: In “Faithful With A Few,” we’re reminded that our praise paves the way for God’s provision.

programme.title: Not Dead Yet
programme.desc: In “Not Dead Yet,” Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us that even in our waiting, God’s still working.

programme.title: The Gift of Victory
programme.desc: In “The Gift Of Victory,” Pastor Steven Furtick challenges us to stand firm because God has given us what we need to win — but it’s our job to take hold of His victory.

programme.title: Keep It 100
programme.desc: In “Keep It 100,” Pastor Steven Furtick reminds us what true faith looks like, and why it’s based on God’s grace, not our works.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Gregorio needs to escape with Julia. Camila is denied love, Jeli wants her to admit her feelings for Max and she tells him the reason for her rejection. At the orphanage she talks to Father Tiziano and Mother Isabel about Rosa Blanco; and believes that she has something to do with this affair and that she is El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Julia flees to defend herself from Marcos, calls for help and calls Max. Ezequiel, armed, arrives at the abandoned house and confronts Marcos. They argue, Marcos loses his head and it is Ezequiel who shoots and then says it was suicide. Pain in the Aragón's house and Fausto swears he will take justice.

programme.title: Abigail - S01:E011 -
programme.desc: Abigail will confront Leonel about being the crazy person that stalks her. Carlos Alfredo tries to convince himself that María Clara is the woman for him. Abigail finds out and is obsessed with stopping it. Carlos Alfredo proposes to María Clara.

programme.desc: Programa que conecta al público con temas de actualidad global , ofreciendo una visión informada de la "Aldea Global."

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Ezequiel se enfrentan por Camila. Astrid trata de manipular a Roberto para sacarle información a cambio de dinero. Max acusa a Camila de prostituta y decide sacarla de su vida. El regreso de Rosa Blanco es traumático.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max decide enfrentar a Roberto, y cede a la seducción de Astrid, pero no por amor sino por despecho. Durante una cena familiar, Ezequiel brinda por Octavia, pero expresa su intención de casarse con otra mujer. Camila sabe que su madre regresará.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila no entiende por qué su madre regresa para vengarse y el motivo de tanto odio. Madre Isabel, Padre Tiziano y Elda, guardan un cómplice silencio. Max enfrenta a Roberto y Camila reacciona con celos y rabia.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila miente sobre su relación con Roberto. Max está muy golpeado y esta situación la aprovecha Astrid que se le insinúa mucho, pero él la rechaza. Ezequiel humillando y maltratando a Leandro, su hijo enfermo.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila dice toda la verdad a Max y confiesa que lo ama, sin embargo, en un nuevo encuentro le pide que confíe en ella mientras trata de resolver el asunto que tanto los atormenta. Roberto, está decidido a matar a Max.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Roberto le pide a Astrid que le consiga un trabajo en Mascarada a cambio de no hacer nada contra Max. Camila confiesa a Max que Roberto la chantajea. Luciano y el inspector interrogan a la Madre Isabel y al Padre Tiziano sobre Rosa Blanco y ellos mienten.

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte 2
programme.desc: Después de desmantelar a una poderosa secta los misteriosos crímenes continúan y la policía se dedica a investigar quien es el nuevo líder de la organización para atraparlo y acabar con la violencia.

programme.title: La Mujer que Hablaba con Los Muertos
programme.desc: Es un film de Terror. Cuando Elena Castaño era una niña, tenía un don: era capaz de comunicarse con los espíritus de los muertos. pero esa capacidad desapareció al crecer.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: Canon: Fidelidad al Límite
programme.desc: Mariana de 35 años, es una arquitecta que trabaja y es socia de un importante despacho de arquitectos, está casada con Julián de 40 años, quien es corresponsal de guerra. Está enamorados, felices, con relación sexual cotidiana. Son padre de dos hijos de 14 y 17 año. En el juego sexual, Julián menciona que no le importaría la infidelidad a condición de estar enterado del hecho con detalles.

programme.title: Bendita Calamidad
programme.desc: Los hermanos Fayos, Anselmo y Ricardo, están con el agua al cuello. Su bar no funciona, el Ayuntamiento lo clausura y se ha agotado el dinero que, para ir tirando, solicitaron a unos prestamistas que no se andan con contemplaciones a la hora de cobrar. Piden consejo a un abogado poco amigo de la ley, Antonio Orestes, que les sugiere una vía rápida para acabar con sus problemas: El secuestro exprés de un constructor de Tarazona.

programme.title: Aerosol
programme.desc: El líder de una banda mexicana mata a un oponente en la guerra de pandillas en los 80's, por lo que huye a la ciudad de Los Ángeles, California. Dieciocho años después regresa al barrio sin un objetivo definido, sólo para encontrar a su hermano menor, involucrado en las pandillas de hoy. El crimen organizado utiliza niños para distribuir droga en los barrios. En combatir la corrupción y el crimen que hay en el barrio, Nuk encuentra un significado para su retorno y un camino para redimir las muertes que causó

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
